Template Name

Use this page as a fun, optional morale booster in Brightspace.

How to use in Brightspace

  1. Go to Content in your course
  2. Select Create New → HTML Document
  3. Open Source (</>)
  4. Copy the HTML below and paste it

Preview

Student Journal

Student Journal

This journal does not save. But you have an option to download.

Tip: After clicking Download PDF, choose Save as PDF in the print window.

Copy HTML
